2603.15722.title: A Framework and Prototype for a Navigable Map of Datasets in Engineering Design and Systems Engineering
2603.15722.paper_summary: The proliferation of data across the system lifecycle presents both a significant opportunity and a challenge for Engineering Design and Systems Engineering (EDSE). While this ``digital thread'' has the potential to drive innovation, the fragmented and inaccessible nature of existing datasets hinders method validation, limits reproducibility, and slows research progress. Unlike fields such as computer vision and natural language processing, which benefit from established benchmark ecosystems, engineering design research often relies on small, proprietary, or ad-hoc datasets. This paper addresses this challenge by proposing a systematic framework for a ``Map of Datasets in EDSE.'' The framework is built upon a multi-dimensional taxonomy designed to classify engineering datasets by domain, lifecycle stage, data type, and format, enabling faceted discovery. An architecture for an interactive discovery tool is detailed and demonstrated through a working prototype, employing a knowledge graph data model to capture rich semantic relationships between datasets, tools, and publications. An analysis of the current data landscape reveals underrepresented areas (``data deserts'') in early-stage design and system architecture, as well as relatively well-represented areas (``data oases'') in predictive maintenance and autonomous systems. The paper identifies key challenges in curation and sustainability and proposes mitigation strategies, laying the groundwork for a dynamic, community-driven resource to accelerate data-centric engineering research.
2603.15722.paper_summary_zh: 數據在系統生命周期中的擴散為工程設計和系統工程（EDSE）帶來了重大的機遇和挑戰。雖然這個「數字線索」有潛力推動創新，但現有數據集的零散和無法訪問的特性卻妨礙了方法驗證，限制了可重複性，並減緩了研究進展。與計算機視覺和自然語言處理等受益於已建立基準生態系統的領域不同，工程設計研究通常依賴於小型、專有或臨時數據集。本文通過提出一個「EDSE數據集地圖」的系統框架來應對這一挑戰。該框架基於一個多維分類法，旨在按領域、生命周期階段、數據類型和格式對工程數據集進行分類，從而實現多面向的發現。本文詳細介紹了一種互動發現工具的架構，並通過一個工作原型進行演示，該原型使用知識圖數據模型來捕捉數據集、工具和出版物之間豐富的語義關係。對當前數據環境的分析揭示了在早期設計和系統架構中存在的代表性不足的領域（「數據沙漠」），以及在預測性維護和自主系統中相對較好代表的領域（「數據綠洲」）。本文確定了在數據管理和可持續性方面的關鍵挑戰，並提出了緩解策略，為加速以數據為中心的工程研究奠定了一個動態、社區驅動的資源基礎。
2603.15722.author: H. Sinan Bank et.al.
2603.15722.authors: H. Sinan Bank, Daniel R. Herber
